arts.ttl: West Ham set to finalize deal for RB Leipzig’s André Silva
arts.sum: West Ham United will look to finalize a deal with RB Leipzig for André Silva, according to Florian Plettenberg. The forward is now West Ham’s number one target this transfer…

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig reach verbal agreement with Aston Villa target Tidiam Gomis
arts.sum: RB Leipzig are set to complete the signing of Caen attacker Tidiam Gomis (18). According to Philipp Hinze, the Bundesliga side have fought off competition from Aston Villa and Milan…

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko's Erling Haaland snub speaks volumes as Mikel Arteta makes admission
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Benjamin Sesko has long been compared to former squad mate Erling Haaland - but he has delivered his own take on the likeness amid news of Arsenal's interest

arts.ttl: West Ham will sign forward with 4 G/A in six games if Andre Silva move collapses
arts.sum: It’s abundantly clear that West Ham need a striker this January and Graham Potter has targeted RB Leipzig’s Andre Silva, however, if that deal falls through the Hammers have an interesting alternative. arts.ttl: Ralf Rangnick's verdict on Benjamin Sesko speaks volumes amid Arsenal transfer talks
arts.sum: Arsenal are once again chasing a deal for Benjamin Sesko, but the RB Leipzig striker would have been playing for Manchester United now if Ralf Rangnick had his way

arts.ttl: Preview: RB Leipzig vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between RB Leipzig and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST
arts.sum: RB Leipzig director Marcel Schafer has insisted that Benjamin Sesko will not leave the club this month despite strong interest from the likes of Arsenal. Arsenal Transfer News Today: Leipzig's Sesko DECISION, Man Utd plot wonderkid RAID, Zubimendi LATEST

arts.ttl: West Ham progressing in talks for a new striker as they close in on RB Leipzig star in hunt for a forward
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: The 29-year old has not been prolific in Leipzig but West Ham are in desperate need of strengthening following injuries to Niclas Fullkrug, Michail Antonio and Jarrod Bowen.

arts.ttl: Andre Silva targeted by Torino, Venezia and West Ham
arts.sum: Former Milan striker Andre Silva is available on loan from RB Leipzig, as Torino, Venezia...

arts.ttl: West Ham in ‘advanced talks’ over player – Loan deal with purchase clause being discussed
arts.sum: West Ham United are in ‘advanced talks’ with RB Leipzig over a deal for striker André Silva to join before the end of the transfer window. That’s according to journalist Philipp Hinze, who reports that West Ham are discussing a loan until the end of the season for the Portuguese striker.
